title: Mojang Advert Texture Pack
description: Texture pack that adds The Leaked Textures Mojang uses in their adverts and Promos
body:
A Quickly Put Together Texture pack that adds Block Textures leaked from Merl that Mojang uses in their adverts and Promos.

Extracted by u/Potato_Man147477

I only added blocks that were on the Provided Texture Atlas and are Present in 1.12.

I probably wont create versions for 1.13 or higher as you guess, this is suprisingly time consuming. You are free to update and upload this pack for Higher Versions.

Pack is 100% Vannila Compatible.

Also block animations are not working as the Texture atlas didnt have them.

There are also Variants (marked "_b" with Animated Textures removed so you can combine this pack with Bare Bones. Just load Bare Bones first and Then apply this Pack on top of it.
